summary: Backend-only SSR validation executed against public URL from frontend/.env. Test run stopped after >50% failures (20/23 failed). Public endpoint appears to serve a different app ("Hello World") instead of the Greeters SSR backend.

critical.issue: Public routes /, /galerie, /livre-dor, /faire-un-don, /actualites, /devenez-benevole, /qui-sommes-nous, /contact, /presse, /mentions-legales do not return Greeters SSR HTML (header-logo-link/data-testid markers missing).
Returns 404. API base currently returns {"message":"Hello World"}, indicating deployment/routing mismatch with expected FastAPI app.
Returns 404; SSR contact submission integration not reachable on public endpoint.
Mounted SSR static assets are not served (returned text/html app shell instead of image/pdf).

integration_issues.issue: Ingress/public URL points to non-Greeters application; SSR/backend feature set cannot be validated end-to-end on user-facing URL.

action_items: Fix deployment/ingress target so REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL points to Greeters backend with SSR router enabled.
After routing fix, re-run SSR route coverage and asset mount checks.
Ensure /api/contact/send is deployed and reachable from public domain.
If requirement is no-JS compatible SSR form posting, set contact form action directly to /api/contact/send in HTML (currently set via JS in template).
critical_code_review_comments: backend/database.py uses fallback DB name ('greeters_db') instead of failing fast when DB_NAME is missing (environment contract violation).
routes/ssr_pages.py has hardcoded BOOKING_URL constant instead of environment-based configuration.
templates/pages/contact.html sets form action to /api/contact first, then rewrites to /api/contact/send in JS; this breaks non-JS SSR form submission expectation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hard failure likely due to wrong public deployment target. Verified with curl: /api/ => {"message":"Hello World"}, /api/health => 404. Re-run same pytest file after ingress/deployment correction.
rca of the issue: RCA: Public URL configured in /app/frontend/.env does not expose the Greeters FastAPI SSR service. Because ingress serves another app shell + minimal API, almost all SSR and API tests fail. Repro: GET /api/ returns Hello World, GET /api/health returns 404, GET /contact returns generic app HTML without SSR contact form markers. Mitigation: correct domain-to-service routing and redeploy expected backend before retesting.
